headline: Why Bill to End Truck Tax Matters for Paccar Inc (PCAR) Stock
summary: Paccar Inc (NASDAQ:PCAR) is one of the best stocks to buy according to billionaire Bill Gates. Paccar stock is up a modest 2.5% year-to-date, but analysts see the stock picking up pace over the next 12 months as market conditions improve.
